zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Drysdale於大約1532年出生在蘇格蘭可拉可曼南史爾時，他的父親John Drysdaill44歲，母親Margaret Whyte34歲。他於1549年11月23日與Margaret Stevin在英國蘇格蘭金洛-爾圖利波爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Drysdale于大约1532年出生在苏格兰可拉可曼南史爾时，他的父亲John Drysdaill44岁，母亲Margaret Whyte34岁。他于1549年11月23日与Margaret Stevin在英国苏格兰金洛-爾圖利波爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Drysdale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dryfesdale near Dumfries (which is normally pronounced Drysdale), named from the river Dryfe + Old English dæl ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Drysdale was born about 1532, in Clackmannanshire, Scotland, his father, John Drysdaill, was 44 and his mother, Margaret Whyte, was 34. He married Margaret Stevin on 23 November 1549, in Tulliebole, Kinross-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Drysdale est né environ 1532, à Clackmannanshire, Écosse, son père, John Drysdaill, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Margaret Whyte, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Stevin le 23 novembre 1549, à Tulliebole, Kinross-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Drysdale um 1532 in Clackmannanshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Drysdaill 44 und seine Mutter Margaret Whyte 34. Er hat am 23. November 1549 in Tulliebole, Kinross-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom Margaret Stevin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Drysdale è nato il circa 1532 nel Clackmannanshire, Scotland, il suo padre, John Drysdaill, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Whyte, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Stevin il 23 novembre 1549, nel Tulliebole, Kinross-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Drysdaleが約1532年にスコットランドクラクマナンシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Drysdaillは44歳，母Margaret Whyteは34歳であった。1549年11月23日にイギリススコットランドキンロス-シュアイアトゥリーボルでMargaret Stevinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Drysdale(이)가 대략 1532년 스컷랜드 클랙먼아실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Drysdaill(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Whyte(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1549년 11월 23일 영국 스코틀랜드 킨로스-실르 툴리볼일에서 Margaret Stevin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Drysdale nasceu aproximadamente 1532, em Clackmannanshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Drysdaill, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Whyte, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Stevin em 23 de novembro de 1549, em Tulliebole, Kinross-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Drysdale родился около 1532 г. в местности клаккманнаньшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Drysdaill было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Whyte, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Stevin 23 ноября 1549 г. в местности туллиебол, кинросс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Drysdale nació aproximadamente 1532, en Clackmannanshire, Scotland, su papá, John Drysdaill, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Margaret Whyte, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Margaret Stevin el 23 de noviembre de 1549, en Tulliebole, Kinross-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas.
